data.title: REAL Shows Network has launched "Nashville Next Door" series, showcasing real estate and lifestyle in Nashville, TN.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on January 21, 2026, REAL Shows Network (RSN) announced the introduction of "Nashville Next Door," a newly launched series on the national TV platform. This show, hosted by prominent figures in the local real estate industry, aims to showcase real estate and lifestyle narratives. The program will be locally produced in Nashville and will be part of RSN's lineup, highlighting the city's unique offerings.

data.title: REAL Shows Network adds Selling Big Island - Hawaii TV series, showcasing Hawaii's Big Island, to lineup.
data.description: A new locally hosted series called Selling Big Island - Hawaii has been added to the lineup of REAL Shows Network (RSN), a national TV platform. This series focuses on showcasing real estate and lifestyle on Hawaii's Big Island. The show is hosted by a resident real estate expert and is aimed at highlighting the unique properties and experiences available in the region. The addition of this series expands RSN's offerings and provides viewers with insights into the real estate market on the Big Island.

data.title: REAL Shows Network launched Living the Dream TV series in Columbus, OH, focusing on real estate and lifestyle, hosted by local real estate leader Justin. Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on January 21, 2026, the REAL Shows Network (RSN) debuted Living the Dream, a new TV series dedicated to real estate and lifestyle content. The show, hosted by local real estate expert Justin, has now become part of the network's lineup. This addition aims to enhance the viewing experience for RSN's audience with a focus on showcasing the local market in Columbus.

data.title: Booz Allen Hamilton beats earnings, raises EPS outlook. Voyager surges on ISS deal. Defense stocks rise.
data.description: Booz Allen Hamilton surpasses earnings expectations and is described as "finding its stride again" as it raises its EPS forecast. Voyager experiences a significant rise following a partnership announcement for missions to the International Space Station. The increased earnings forecast and collaboration for ISS experiments result in a notable surge for two defense stocks, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.
